TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: mcisal mcisal qani hya' ga kay niya' maha musa hmkangi' sa bays kksgtwan niya' qasa hya'. nanu' qu mcisal qani ga, kya uzi qu mkayal na zyuwaw balay, kya uzi qu siy pnhmut mkayal sa kksgtwwan na kknayril, qani hya' ga mcisal squ rangi' nanak, ini' ga mintsway' naha' nanak qani hya', maha iy mcisal squ iyat naha' kinbaq ka misan mqbbaq ga, ini' inhmut kmayal uzi, mutuw pngaga' pnbaq iyal kmayal.
S.PHON: m ¶~ ®is~…ēal m ¶~ ®is~…ēal qani ńßja Ē …£a kaj nija Ē mańßa mus~…ēa ńßmkaŇči Ē s~…ēa ő≤ajs~…ē kks~…ē…£twan nija Ē qas~…ēa ńßja Ē. nanu Ē qu m ¶~ ®is~…ēal qani …£a, kja uzi qu mkajal na zjuwaw ő≤alaj, kja uzi qu s~…ēij pnńßmut mkajal s~…ēa kks~…ē…£twwan na kknajril, qani ńßja Ē …£a m ¶~ ®is~…ēal s~…ēqu raŇči Ē nanak, ini Ē …£a mints~…ēwaj Ē nańßa Ē nanak qani ńßja Ē, mańßa ij m ¶~ ®is~…ēal s~…ēqu ijat nańßa Ē kinő≤aq ka mis~…ēan mqő≤ő≤aq …£a, ini Ē inńßmut kmajal uzi, mutuw pŇča…£a Ē pnő≤aq ijal kmajal.
S.FORM: mcisal mcisal qani hya' ga kay niya' maha musa hmkangi' sa bays kksgtwan niya' qasa hya'. nanu' qu mcisal qani ga, kya uzi qu mkayal na zyuwaw balay, kya uzi qu siy pnhmut mkayal sa kksgtwwan na kknayril, qani hya' ga mcisal squ rangi' nanak, ini' ga mintsway' naha' nanak qani hya', maha iy mcisal squ iyat naha' kinbaq ka misan mqbbaq ga, ini' inhmut kmayal uzi, mutuw pngaga' pnbaq iyal kmayal.
S.PHON: m ¶~ ®is~…ēal m ¶~ ®is~…ēal qani ńßja Ē …£a kaj nija Ē mańßa mus~…ēa ńßmkaŇči Ē s~…ēa ő≤ajs~…ē kks~…ē…£twan nija Ē qas~…ēa ńßja Ē. nanu Ē qu m ¶~ ®is~…ēal qani …£a, kja uzi qu mkajal na zjuwaw ő≤alaj, kja uzi qu s~…ēij pnńßmut mkajal s~…ēa kks~…ē…£twwan na kknajril, qani ńßja Ē …£a m ¶~ ®is~…ēal s~…ēqu raŇči Ē nanak, ini Ē …£a mints~…ēwaj Ē nańßa Ē nanak qani ńßja Ē, mańßa ij m ¶~ ®is~…ēal s~…ēqu ijat nańßa Ē kinő≤aq ka mis~…ēan mqő≤ő≤aq …£a, ini Ē inńßmut kmajal uzi, mutuw pŇča…£a Ē pnő≤aq ijal kmajal.
